Label the types of papillae and parts of the taste buds. (1 point) Label the regions and structures of the ear. (1 point) HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 69

Label the muscles of the eye. (0.5 points) Label the structures and regions of the eye. (0.5 points) 70 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB ACTIVITIES A list of words is provided below that you are expected to identify, learn, and label on the models provided. Note that not all models will have some of the organs/structures, so be sure to find them on an alternate model. You must use all the words provided. Using the colored tape provided, write the number that corresponds to the organ/structure and place them on your model. When complete, notify your TA so they may check your work.
